def negative_test_calls_time_sleep_for_coordination():
    rule_id = "test_calls_time_sleep_for_coordination"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Test calls time.sleep to coordinate with async or threaded code instead of events or monkeypatching."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
